details.heading: Your transaction is secure
details.content: We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

about_item: 【Multi-functional】 This pet furniture can be used as pet crate ,also as a side table, end table or night stand.The wide top provides enough place to put some decorations such as small/medium plant, magazines, family picture frames and night lamps and so on.
【Double doors design & Adjustable feet】 Your pet will go in and out easily with double doors. When the floor is not flat , this side table can be kept stable by the adjustable feet.
【Particleboard and wire construction】 Chew-resistant construction for pet-safe durability and long service life.
【Dog crate with Cushion】 Matching cushion in the crate take your dog a warm and more comfortable sleep, and also we use the wooden plate at the bottom, no pet foot jamming, more safety.

【Size selection】 please be sure to measure your pet's height and length data before you buy, refer to the purchase advice to choose the right crate; if you find it difficult to choose, you can leave your pet's breed, height and length in the Q&A area, we will immediately recommend the right crate for you!

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate furniture easy to assemble with well-written directions and appreciate its appearance and quality. The size is spacious enough for full-grown Labradors, and customers describe it as sturdy. However, durability and latches receive negative feedback, with customers reporting that doors break after a couple of months and the latches take significant fiddling to open. Value for money is mixed, with some finding it worth the price while others consider it too expensive.

insights.title: Appearance
insights.summary: Customers find the dog crate furniture visually appealing, with one mentioning it's not an eye sore.

examples.snippet: ...I put it together yesterday. Very easy to put together. Looks great, one of my dogs is happy with it, the other one is still not too sure. LOL!...
I needed a bigger crate for my corgi. This crate delivered. Its beautiful, easy to put together, and my corgi goes in it even if I dont ask her to.
It looks nice... BUT other than that, it's has been useless for my home. Waste of money. My boxer broke out of it the first time we put him in it....
...I hate the way regular dog crates look in my house so this looks good and offers the security that I need to know my puppy is safe. A great buy!!!

authors_reviews.title: Very nice looking
authors_reviews.text: Relatively easy to put together, my husband never reads directions and he managed in a fairly short time. It looks nice, much better than a metal cage. It's very sturdy and has ample room for our pup. The pad is thin, so we got her a small bed which fits in nicely. Works great.
authors_reviews.author: Kindle Customer

authors_reviews.title: Functionality meets aesthetics! (Chefs kiss)
authors_reviews.text: We’re crate training our older dog after a procedure that requires him to be crated. And so we replaced my bedside stand with this crate and the size is great not just for him but for me to have all the things next to me in bed! (Haha) He’s done very well with this crate and it’s very nice looking. Very very easy to put together! Soft cloth cleaned it up nice too. Great quality and value for money! The pad that comes with it is thin imo so if you’re wanting something more plush definitely get something in addition to the pad provided but, bc of his type of surgery having the pad not be too plush actually works for us and his needs currently. I’ll likely change it out for something cozier once he’s healed completely. This imo is for a dog that’s already potty trained Bc it doesn’t have a removable bottom. If your dog is having accidents this might not be the create for you for that reason. Our dog is a westiepoo mix he’s 21lbs
authors_reviews.author: Brittany

authors_reviews.title: Love the kennel!
authors_reviews.text: It’s great and does the job. Looks nice too. Easy to put together.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Low Security and High Fashion
authors_reviews.text: The crate arrived on time and in manufacturers packaging.Pros-Cost effective-Looks good-Easy to put togetherCons-Slight gap in the crate floor and its walls-The locking mechanisms don’t really secure as you would want for this application (see pictures)Overall I’m pleased with the purchase, however it does leave a lot to be desired. If you need real security for an anxious or escape artist dog then this is NOT for you. Best for a calm, relaxed dog and I would add a method of security to the doors on top of the what’s provided.
authors_reviews.author: Nick H.

authors_reviews.title: Nice kennel.
authors_reviews.text: I’ve had this for about a month now. It fits out shitzhu perfectly and looks nice in our living room. It’s quite sturdy and the locking mechanism is simple. It cleans easily and the pad that comes with it washes well.
authors_reviews.author: Guam Shopper

authors_reviews.title: Pretty good
authors_reviews.text: I bought two of these. Very cute. Pretty sturdy. The screw on the top did not match up so the top is loose. That was upsetting.
authors_reviews.author: Colleen

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Rating
authors_reviews.text: We love it and so does our dog!Shes never been crated, and slept in our bed all her life . Shes never absolutely loves her own space ! Easy to assemble and opens upward, saving bending over first thing in the morning. It’s attractive at our bedside and convenient top serves to hold pillows and blankets while making up the bed.
authors_reviews.author: Linda Rees Gurney

authors_reviews.title: Doggy prison!
authors_reviews.text: 5 star customer service and a 3 star product. My dog is about 63 lbs, husky mix and she is entirely crate trained so she prefers to have her own space and den. For starters, it looks exactly like the image on the listing, it's beautiful. One of the biggest reasons that drove me to purchase this was because it matched with my other furniture in the house. It took about 35-40 minutes to assemble (thanks to my sweet boyfriend) and the wood/metal is great quality. I love that there are two door openings (on the front and on the side). Here's where my complaints come in: I tried 2 different sizes of this product: one was too small on the floor but the perfect height for my dog but the bigger size was perfect sized on the floor but the height was way too tall and made my dog feel nervous that she didn't have that "den" feeling. The floor mat felt soft but it was poor quality, it pills easily and there's practically no way to wash the mat without making it moldy because it's just not meant to be thrown in the washer so it's not as pet friendly as I would have expected for the price, making it hard to clean. I think this product is way too expensive to be having these issues honestly, I thought I was splurging for my pup but it just led to a big hassle having to return and buy and return again. I will note this: Both Amazon and the manufacturer did an amazing job working with me to return and repurchase this in different sizes to make sure it worked for my pup and it shipped very quickly and arrived at my dog in about 5 business days which is pretty darn fast! I really appreciated Amazon's patience working with me through this because I dread making returns especially on such a heavy and huge item.
authors_reviews.author: ari gha

other_countries_reviews.title: It’s heavy and well designed
other_countries_reviews.text: It’s exactly as specified, directions of assembly could be a little more detailed, otherwise all great!
other_countries_reviews.author: Rowena Hopper

other_countries_reviews.title: Very happy with the purchase!
other_countries_reviews.text: Got the Small for my 3.5kg Cavapoo. Perfect for her to sleep in when we’re out. Quality is good, all the bolt holes lined up perfectly, easy to assemble.
other_countries_reviews.author: Vicky
